# HADO App 3.0.0.0 Update05 Scope

## Purpose
Add a safe candidate tray between the Update04.2 type-candidate browser and the existing formation screen.

## Implemented
- Add `候補トレイへ追加` to visible type-candidate cards.
- Persist up to 60 review candidates in `localStorage`.
- Add a candidate-tray modal with delete and clear actions.
- Add `部隊編成画面で確認`, which opens the existing formation screen.

## Safety boundary
- The tray does not write formation records directly.
- Final placement remains an explicit operation in the existing formation screen.
- Existing attendant, formation, troop type, range, equipment-duplication, adviser, five-elements, siege-weapon, armament, warhorse and warhorse-skill gates are not bypassed.

{
  "version": "3.0.0.0",
  "update": "Update05",
  "scope": "safe candidate tray staging UI and existing formation-screen handoff",
  "implemented": [
    "candidate cards gain add-to-tray action",
    "candidate tray persisted in localStorage",
    "candidate tray modal supports delete and clear",
    "handoff opens existing formation screen only"
  ],
  "safety": {
    "directFormationMutation": false,
    "existingFormationScreenUsed": true,
    "existingGateBypass": false,
    "candidateTrayLimit": 60
  },
  "checks": [
    "src/update05_candidate_tray.js parsed by common workflow node --check",
    "index.html and hado_library_3.0.0.0.html receive identical inline script insertion",
    "common workflow validates cmp --silent index.html hado_library_3.0.0.0.html"
  ]
}
